data.name: World of Witchcraft
data.detailed_description:
故事

在一个被野心与火焰统治的遥远王国里，一位年迈的君王梦想着扩展自己的遗产。痴迷于征服，他派遣儿子们征服周边的省份——这些曾经和平的土地，如今由一个神秘且强大的女巫团体所守护。

但命运从不忠于血脉。

在其中一次残酷的征战中，国王最年长的儿子——他的骄傲与继承人——战死沙场，被无法用剑抵挡的奥术力量所击杀。悲伤很快转化为愤怒，而愤怒召唤复仇。

绝望之下，国王求助于一位早已被放逐的术士。术士提出援助——但方式远非国王所预料。通过一个黑暗且被禁止的仪式，他让死去的王子复生……不再是人类，而是某种其他的存在。某种饥渴、扭曲、非自然的存在。

如今，一个由欲望与亡者之力组成的生物重返大地，带着亵渎与毁灭曾杀死他的女巫们的原始欲望——一个女巫团接一个。

这是一个关于力量、腐化、禁忌复活……以及将这一切连接起来的堕落魔法的故事。

特色内容：

  • 露骨的情色场景

  • 令人惊艳的高清画面

  • 引人入胜的黑暗奇幻剧情

  • 独特角色，包括诱人的女巫与堕落贵族

  • 互动小游戏与探索环节

  • 涉及禁忌、变身与魔法支配的主题

data.short_description: 沉浸在一个充满野心、魔法与欲望交织的世界中。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or Later
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: Legal Information: All images and artworks featured in the game are objects of intellectual property and are protected by copyright. The developer holds full and exclusive rights to commercially utilize the aforementioned artworks provided by the artist, within the context of creating and distributing this game.

data.name: World of Witchcraft
data.detailed_description:
Story

In a distant kingdom ruled by ambition and fire, an aging monarch dreams of expanding his legacy. Obsessed with conquest, he sends his sons to subjugate the neighboring provinces — once peaceful lands now protected by a mysterious and fiercely resistant coven of witches.

But fate has no loyalty to bloodlines.

During one of these brutal campaigns, the king’s eldest son — his pride, his heir — falls in battle, slain by arcane forces that no sword can match. Grief soon turns to rage. And rage calls for vengeance.

Desperate to strike back, the king seeks out a warlock long banished from the royal court. The warlock offers help — but not the kind the king expects. Through a dark and forbidden ritual, he raises the fallen prince from the grave… not as a man, but as something else. Something hungry. Twisted. Unnatural.

Now, a creature of lust and undeath walks the earth once more, driven by a primal desire to defile and destroy the witches who ended his life — one coven at a time.

This is a tale of power, corruption, forbidden resurrection… and the sinful magic that binds them all.

Features:

  • Explicit adult scenes

  • Stunning HQ artwork

  • A captivating dark fantasy narrative

  • Unique characters including seductive witches and corrupted royalty

  • Interactive mini-games and exploration sequences

  • Themes of taboo, transformation, and magical domination

data.short_description: Immerse yourself in a world where ambition, magic, and lust intertwine.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
